title: Front Office Manager - Massive Restaurants South Asia Partners - Immediate Joiners Preferred

jsonLd.title: Front Office Manager - Massive Restaurants South Asia Partners - Immediate Joiners Preferred
jsonLd.description:
Massive Restaurants South Asia Partners is actively seeking a talented and motivated Front Office Manager to join our dynamic team in Pune. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Massive Restaurants South Asia Partners:
Massive Restaurants South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions
• Assist in menu planning, costing, and food festival coordination
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Tour Planning
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in Crisis Management
• Proficiency in MICE
• Proficiency in Travel Management
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in HACCP

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Flexible working hours
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Massive Restaurants South Asia Partners!
